title: brachyglottis revoluta
intro: Brachyglottis revoluta, also known as the New Zealand button bush, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Brachyglottis revoluta include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Brachyglottis revoluta typically include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
